description:
The samba-common package should be installed. The samba-common package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install samba-common
rationale: If the samba-common package is not installed, samba cannot be configured.
ocil_clause: the samba-common package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the samba-common package is installed: 
$ rpm -q samba-common
title: Install the Samba Common Package
